testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.assignment.DeviceAssignmentServiceTest

testcase.name: findCurrentAssignment returns null when device has no active row()
createAssignment persists active row when device has no current assignment()
updateAssignment publishes DeviceMappingChangedEvent for the new restaurant()
multiple devices each carry their own independent active assignment()
updateAssignment deactivates previous active row and inserts new one()
createAssignment on a device with an existing active row delegates to update()
getCurrentAssignment throws AssignmentNotFound when device has no active row()
createAssignment throws DeviceNotFound when device id is unknown()
createAssignment over an existing active row publishes a single event for the new restaurant()
createAssignment throws RestaurantNotFound when restaurant id is unknown()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:30.459+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.d.a.DeviceAssignmentService : createAssignment: device=device-b23d78c5-a38f-4452-a8cb-fa20d166caca
